title: Curriculum and Assessment Review Final Report
body: "Background  In July 2024, the government commissioned Professor Becky Francis CBE to convene and chair a panel of experts to conduct the Curriculum and Assessment Review.  The government has considered the Review’s recommendations and responded with a plan to secure an excellent education for every child and young person, raising aspirations and building a world-leading curriculum, assessment and qualifications system for all.  The Review, and the Panel’s Interim Report, was informed by research, statistical evidence and polling data. It was undertaken in close consultation with:   education professionals and other experts parents and carers, children and young people stakeholders such as employers, universities and trade unions   Final Report  The Final Report:   draws on the views shared by these groups, including those provided via a Call for Evidence  sets out the Review’s conclusions and recommendations   Accompanying documents  The Final Report is accompanied by:   an analytical annex an analysis of the responses to the Call for Evidence teacher polling data   Government response   The Curriculum and Assessment Review Final Report: government response and an ‘explainer’ setting out a proposal for developing and consulting on Progress 8 and Attainment 8 have been published.  Alternative formats  The Final Report is available in:   Easy Read Braille British Sign Language   Easy Read  The Easy Read guide summarises the key points from the Final Report for people with learning difficulties or low literacy.  Braille  Email curriculum-assessment.review@education.gov.uk to request a Braille version in the form of a:   .dxb file if you have .dxb software hard copy if you do not have .dxb software   British Sign Language  Executive summary and recommendations  Curriculum and Assessment Review: executive summary and recommendations (BSL, audio and subtitles version)  Full report  Curriculum and Assessment Review: full report (BSL, audio and subtitles version)  "
